infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Used to find nearby E85 fuel stations and measure GPS performance.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Used for GPS performance measurement during runs.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Used to connect to OBD2 scanners and Dragy GPS module for live vehicle data.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Used to connect to OBD2 scanners and Dragy GPS module.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: Allow PerformanceIQ to connect to OBD2 and Dragy GPS devices.
